svg:
Klasni dijagram – Smart Quality Advisor UML klasni dijagram koji prikazuje model podataka projekta Smart Quality Advisor sa svim klasama, atributima i vezama.
«enum» ProductType
KULEN SAUSAGE OTHER
«enum» BatchStatus
ACTIVE WARNING BLOCKED APPROVED
«enum» ProductionPhase
RECEIVING CURING FERMENTATION SMOKING DRYING_AGING FINAL_INSPECTION
Batch
– id : String – productType : ProductType – status : BatchStatus – currentPhase : ProductionPhase – aktivnaUpozorenja : List<String> – log : List<String>
— Receiving — – phReceivinga : double – temperaturaReceivinga : double – rawMaterialShelfLife : LocalDate – vizuelnaOcenaReceivinga : int
— Curing — – saltPercentage : double – brineTemperature : double – curingDurationHours : int
— Fermentation/Smoking/Drying/Final — – fermentationPhByDay : List<Double> – smokeTemperature : double – smokingDurationHours : int – weeklyWeightLossPercentages : List<Double> – phFinalnog : double – awVrednost : double – vizuelnaOcenaFinalnog : int
+ addAlert(alert: String) : void + block(reason: String) : void + approve() : void + imaAktivnoUpozorenje(upo: String) : boolean + getPhNaDan(dan: int) : double
SaltRule
– productType : ProductType – minSol : double – maxSol : double
+ getProductType() : ProductType + getMinSol() : double
WeightLossRule
– productType : ProductType – minWeightLossPercent : double – rokNedelje : int
+ getProductType() : ProductType + getMinWeightLossPercent() : double + getRokNedelje() : int
QualityService
– kieContainer : KieContainer
+ pokreniDemonstraciju() : void + pokreniPravila(s, ps, pg) : void + demoPhase1..6() : void
QualityController
– qualityService : QualityService
+ pokreniDemo() : String GET /api/quality/demo
«DRL pravila» Kjar modul
phase1_receiving.drl – F1-1..F1-6 + advance phase2_curing.drl – F2-1..F2-6 + Template SaltRule phase3_fermentation.drl – F3-1..F3-9 + CEP trend pH phase4_smoking.drl – F4-1..F4-7 + CEP aggregation phase5_drying_aging.drl – F5-1..F5-8 + Template GubitakTezine phase6_final_inspection.drl – F6-1..F6-5 + final approval Forward chaining · CEP trend/aggregation · Template mehanizam
Batch (association) -->
koristi
zavisi od legenda
